Related Entities

  • hospital M HEALTH FAIRVIEW RIDGES HOSPITAL 4-star overall rating
  • snf Southview Acres HealthCare Center 3-star, 210 beds
  • snf Ebenezer Ridges Geriatric Care Center 4-star, 114 beds
  • snf AUGUSTANA CARE HASTINGS HEALTH AND REHABILITATION 5-star, 72 beds
  • snf Trinity Care Center 5-star, 80 beds
  • snf REGINA SENIOR LIVING 2-star, 57 beds
  • snf APPLE VALLEY VILLAGE HEALTH CARE CENTER 5-star, 162 beds
  • snf GOOD SAMARITAN SOCIETY INVER GROVE HEIGHTS 2-star, 46 beds
  • snf Woodlyn Heights Healthcare Center 1-star, 79 beds
  • snf WALKER METHODIST WESTWOOD RIDGE II 1-star, 37 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
